title: Musician + Orchestra — E2E Integration Tests (MiniMax + Codex)
description: Expand E2E and integration test coverage using MiniMax API and Codex device flow. Implement real SSE streaming.

stories.title: Phases 1-5 baseline
acceptanceCriteria: 172 tests, 0 failures across all 10 apps

stories.title: MiniMax multi-turn conversation E2E
acceptanceCriteria: apps/musician_core/test/musician_core/provider/minimax_multiturn_e2e_test.exs exists
Test sends a 2-message conversation (user + assistant + user) to MiniMax API
Test asserts {:ok, response} with non-empty content
Test is tagged @moduletag :provider_e2e and skips inline when MINIMAX_API_KEY is not set
MINIMAX_API_KEY set: test exits 0 with 1 test passing
MINIMAX_API_KEY unset: test exits 0 trivially

stories.title: MiniMax list_models E2E
acceptanceCriteria: apps/musician_core/test/musician_core/provider/minimax_models_e2e_test.exs exists
Test calls OpenAICompat.list_models/1 with MiniMax config
Test asserts {:ok, models} where models is a list (may be empty list on free tier)
Test handles {:error, {:api_error, 404, _}} gracefully (endpoint may not exist on free tier)
Test is tagged @moduletag :provider_e2e and skips inline when MINIMAX_API_KEY is not set
Test exits 0 with MINIMAX_API_KEY set

stories.title: Real SSE streaming implementation + MiniMax streaming E2E
acceptanceCriteria: apps/musician_core/lib/musician_core/provider/openai_compat.ex stream/2 uses Req streaming (not a stub that immediately halts)
stream/2 parses SSE data lines: splits on \n\n, extracts data: prefix, skips [DONE]
stream/2 returns {:ok, stream} where stream is an Elixir Stream of parsed chunk maps
Unit test: stream/2 with mocked SSE response returns stream emitting parsed chunks
Unit test covers: data line parsing, [DONE] termination, empty line skipping
apps/musician_core/test/musician_core/provider/minimax_streaming_e2e_test.exs exists
E2E test calls OpenAICompat.stream/2 with MiniMax config and collects at least 1 chunk
E2E test is tagged @moduletag :provider_e2e and skips inline when MINIMAX_API_KEY is not set
`mix test apps/musician_core` exits 0

stories.title: Codex device flow live integration test
acceptanceCriteria: apps/musician_auth/test/musician_auth/codex_device_integration_test.exs exists
Test calls CodexDevice.request_device_code/0 against real https://auth.openai.com/oauth/device/code endpoint
Test asserts {:ok, %{device_code: dc, user_code: uc, verification_uri: uri, expires_in: exp, interval: iv}} where all fields are non-nil
Test prints the user_code and verification_uri to stdout so user can authorize
Test is tagged @moduletag :provider_e2e and @moduletag :codex_e2e
Test skips inline when CODEX_E2E env var is not set to 'true'
Test also verifies exchange_device_code/1 with the device_code returns {:error, :pending} (not yet authorized)
`mix test apps/musician_auth` exits 0 (test skips when CODEX_E2E != true)

stories.title: Codex token-based completion E2E (conditional)
acceptanceCriteria: apps/musician_auth/test/musician_auth/codex_completion_e2e_test.exs exists
Test reads ~/.musician/auth/codex.yaml via TokenStore.read/1
Test skips inline when codex.yaml does not exist or access_token is nil
When tokens present: test calls OpenAICompat.complete/2 with codex endpoint and token
When tokens present: asserts {:ok, response} with non-empty content
Test is tagged @moduletag :provider_e2e
`mix test apps/musician_auth` exits 0
